$schema_note: Recommended distributed BI design patterns (positive counterparts to the anti-patterns). Each is a default approach an agent should reach for. IDs reference best practices (BD-BP-*) and concepts (BD-CN-*, PY-*).

patterns.name: Single-node first
patterns.do: Estimate post-pruning size; if it fits one machine (Polars/DuckDB) or a warehouse pushdown, do not scale out.

patterns.name: Broadcast the small dimension
patterns.do: Broadcast small dims (products/stores) against large facts to avoid shuffling the fact.

patterns.name: Pre-aggregate the many-side before join
patterns.do: Aggregate the one-to-many side to the join grain first; fixes fan-out and shuffle blow-up.

patterns.name: Filter and project early
patterns.do: Push row filters and column selection before every wide step; verify pruning in the plan.

patterns.name: Let AQE handle common skew; salt the rest
patterns.do: Enable AQE skew-join and coalescing; salt only known hot keys AQE/broadcast can't resolve.

patterns.name: Additive partial aggregation
patterns.do: Express aggregations to allow map-side combine; recompute non-additive measures at grain.

patterns.name: Choose exact vs approximate distinct deliberately
patterns.do: Use approx-distinct for tolerant trends; exact for financial reconciliation; label which.

patterns.name: Columnar + table format storage
patterns.do: Store analytical data as partitioned Parquet, or Delta/Iceberg when updates/evolution/ACID are needed.

patterns.name: Idempotent incremental writes with late-data lookback
patterns.do: Partition-overwrite or merge-on-key; process only the changed slice; reprocess a late-data lookback window idempotently.

patterns.name: Reconcile by distributed control totals; hand off to gate
patterns.do: Compute additive control totals distributed at each stage; record evidence; hand to readiness/SQL gate, never self-approve.

patterns.name: Inspect distributed, never collect to driver
patterns.do: Use aggregates, limit+sample, and the job UI to inspect; collect only small bounded results.

patterns.name: Diagnose to fast-enough-and-cheap-enough
patterns.do: Read plan + job UI, fix the dominant cost, re-measure time and cost, stop at budget.
